title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Microtek International South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Microtek International South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Microtek International South Asia Partners has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Kanpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Microtek International South Asia Partners:
Microtek International South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microtek International South Asia Partners!
